what: claudinite-lesson label — the trigger for the portable-lesson hand-off. The hand-off workflow guards on it, ensures it on the Claudinite side, and applies it to the copied issue. The label must also exist in this repo (the optimize-procedures routine ensures it idempotently before applying it) for GitHub to keep it on a new issue. Counts include comments. See dev/procedures/general/claudinite-handoff.md.
